findings.finding: Atomic-landing enforcement reduces to operator discipline + post-commit self-check + manual PR-review checklist; no mechanical gate per spec Non-Requirements (no pre-commit hook).
findings.evidence_quote: **No new pre-commit hook** for hard-prereq enforcement.

findings.finding: Task 4's Files list references docs/internals/sdk.md (post-Task-1 path) but Depends on: [1] is advisory metadata; the plan does not cite the runtime mechanism that enforces dependency-order execution.
Plan's Verification Strategy quotes the spec's intermediate-commit invariant but names no CI workflow that runs these per-commit checks on the PR branch.
findings.evidence_quote: Tests are NOT required to pass at every intermediate commit

findings.finding: Task 1 edits README.md (drops L127) and Task 9 fully rewrites README.md with only post-hoc grep verifiers; a fresh-agent Task 9 rewrite using a stale Documentation-index template can re-introduce the dropped row (caught only post-commit).
findings.evidence_quote: **No new pre-commit hook** for hard-prereq enforcement.

findings.finding: Plan addresses PID write under wheel install and ~/.cache absence, but not _resolve_user_project_root's CortexProjectRootError when cortex dashboard runs from a directory with no lifecycle/ or backlog/.
findings.reviewer_angle: Dashboard implementation under macOS-primary platform constraint
